allow: Bash(cmd /c "psql -U postgres -d apexiq -c \\"SELECT e.id, e.student_id, e.batch_id, e.fee_paid, e.status, b.name as batch_name, u.full_name as student_name FROM enrollments e JOIN batches b ON b.id = e.batch_id JOIN students s ON s.id = e.student_id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE b.name ILIKE '%%mahasangam%%' ORDER BY e.enrolled_at DESC;\\" 2>&1")

Bash(cmd /c "set PGPASSWORD=postgres && psql -U postgres -d apexiq -c \\"SELECT e.id, e.student_id, e.batch_id, e.fee_paid, e.status, b.name as batch_name, u.full_name as student_name FROM enrollments e JOIN batches b ON b.id = e.batch_id JOIN students s ON s.id = e.student_id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE b.name ILIKE '%%mahasangam%%' ORDER BY e.enrolled_at DESC;\\" 2>&1")

Bash(cmd /c "set PGPASSWORD=postgres && psql.exe -U postgres -d apexiq -c \\"SELECT e.id, b.name, u.full_name, e.fee_paid, e.status FROM enrollments e JOIN batches b ON b.id = e.batch_id JOIN students s ON s.id = e.student_id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE b.name ILIKE '%mahasangam%';\\" 2>&1")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d apexiq -c "SELECT e.id, b.name as batch_name, u.full_name, e.fee_paid, e.status FROM enrollments e JOIN batches b ON b.id = e.batch_id JOIN students s ON s.id = e.student_id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE b.name ILIKE '%mahasangam%';")
